column1: THERAGEN  |  DM_DDL
PostgreSQL CREATE TABLE statements for the Document Management schema.
-- doc_mgmt schema
-- Generated from Theragen DBS-001 v1.0
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS doc_mgmt;
-- D01  Department
-- Cross-functional department lookup.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.department (
department_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
code VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- CLN/REG/RND/OPS/FIN/COM/IT/HR/ENT.
name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Display name.
head_person_id UUID,  -- Department head.
active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Active flag.,
CONSTRAINT fk_department_head_person_id FOREIGN KEY (head_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D02  Person
-- Workforce member or external contributor.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.person (
person_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
employee_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE,  -- HRIS identifier.
email VARCHAR(254) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Primary email.
display_name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,  -- Full name.
department_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Home department.
role_id UUID,  -- Primary role.
manager_person_id UUID,  -- Reporting manager (self-ref).
employment_type VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Worker type.,  -- employment_type
active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Active flag.,
start_date DATE NOT NULL,  -- Start date.
end_date DATE,  -- End date (if any).
CONSTRAINT fk_person_department_id FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_person_role_id FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.role(role_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_person_manager_person_id FOREIGN KEY (manager_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D03  Role
-- Job role catalog.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.role (
role_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Role name.
department_id UUID,  -- Owning department, if specific.
controlled_work BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT If role performs controlled work (drives training requirement).,
description TEXT,  -- Role description.
CONSTRAINT fk_role_department_id FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id)
-- D04  Compliance Frame
-- Regulatory or methodological frame.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.compliance_frame (
frame_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Short code.
name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Display name.
authority VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,  -- Issuing body.
applies_to TEXT NOT NULL,  -- When applicable.
reference_url VARCHAR(500),  -- Authoritative source URL.
-- D05  Document Type
-- Controlled document type catalog (CHR, SOP, etc.).
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.document_type (
document_type_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
code VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- 3-letter type code.
name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,  -- Plain name.
lifecycle_phase VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Lifecycle phase.,  -- lifecycle_phase
default_review_cycle VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Default review cadence.,  -- review_cycle
requires_approval BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Whether Z-2 approval required.
-- D06  Controlled Template
-- Versioned blank template that documents are created from.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.controlled_template (
template_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
template_code VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Template Doc ID.
document_type_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Which type.
title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,  -- Template title.
version VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT Template version.,
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Template status.,  -- doc_status
storage_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,  -- SharePoint or repo path.
owner_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Template owner.
published_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Publication timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_controlled_template_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY (document_type_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document_type(document_type_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_controlled_template_owner_person_id FOREIGN KEY (owner_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D07  Document
-- Controlled document record. The spine of the DM schema.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.document (
document_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
doc_id VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Theragen Doc ID, e.g. THG-OPS-CHR-014.
document_type_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Type.
primary_department_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Owning department.
title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,  -- Document title.
subtitle VARCHAR(500),  -- One-line subtitle.
lifecycle_phase VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Lifecycle phase.,  -- lifecycle_phase
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Current status.,  -- doc_status
current_version VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT Current version.,
owner_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Document Owner.
approver_person_id UUID,  -- Designated Approver.
review_cycle VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Review cycle.,  -- review_cycle
next_review_due DATE,  -- Next periodic review due date.
intake_id VARCHAR(16),  -- Originating intake.
classification VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Sensitivity classification.,  -- classification
storage_system VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT System of record.,  -- storage_system
storage_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,  -- File path or URL.
retired_at TIMESTAMPTZ,  -- If retired, when.
superseded_by_document_id UUID,  -- Successor doc if any.
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT Created.,
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT Updated.,
CONSTRAINT fk_document_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY (document_type_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document_type(document_type_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_primary_department_id FOREIGN KEY (primary_department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_owner_person_id FOREIGN KEY (owner_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_approver_person_id FOREIGN KEY (approver_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_intake_id FOREIGN KEY (intake_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.intake_submission(intake_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_superseded_by_document_id FOREIGN KEY (superseded_by_document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id)
-- D08  Document Version
-- Immutable version history for a Document.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.document_version (
version_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Parent document.
version VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,  -- Version string.
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Status at this version.,  -- doc_status
change_summary TEXT NOT NULL,  -- What changed.
change_class VARCHAR DEFAULT If amendment, class.,  -- cr_class
linked_cr_id UUID,  -- Linked CR.
author_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Author.
effective_date DATE,  -- Effective on.
storage_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,  -- Versioned file path.
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT Created.,
CONSTRAINT fk_document_version_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_version_linked_cr_id FOREIGN KEY (linked_cr_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.change_request_gov(cr_gov_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_version_author_person_id FOREIGN KEY (author_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D09  Document Review
-- Review event prior to baseline or amendment.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.document_review (
review_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
version_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Version under review.
reviewer_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Reviewer.
review_type VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Type.,  -- review_type
disposition VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Disposition.,  -- review_disposition
comments TEXT,  -- Comments / dispositions.
reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Review timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_document_review_version_id FOREIGN KEY (version_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document_version(version_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_review_reviewer_person_id FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D10  Document Approval
-- 21 CFR Part 11 §11.50 signed approval.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.document_approval (
approval_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
version_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Version being approved.
approver_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Approver.
signature_meaning VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Per 21 CFR §11.50.,  -- signature_meaning
signed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Sign timestamp.
esig_hash VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,  -- Signature hash.
ip_address INET,  -- Client IP at signing.
reason TEXT,  -- Reason / context.
CONSTRAINT fk_document_approval_version_id FOREIGN KEY (version_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document_version(version_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_approval_approver_person_id FOREIGN KEY (approver_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D11  Document Retirement
-- Retirement event for a baselined document.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.document_retirement (
retirement_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Document retired.
retired_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Approver of retirement.
reason TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Why retired.
superseded_by_document_id UUID,  -- Successor.
archive_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,  -- Archive location.
retired_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Retirement timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_document_retirement_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_retirement_retired_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (retired_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_document_retirement_superseded_by_document_id FOREIGN KEY (superseded_by_document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id)
-- D12  Intake Submission
-- Submitted Integrated Intake Form.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.intake_submission (
intake_submission_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
intake_id VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- INT-YYYY-NNNN.
submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Submission timestamp.
requester_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Requester.
requesting_department_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Requesting department.
request_title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,  -- Request title.
request_type VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Type.,  -- request_type
business_problem TEXT NOT NULL,  -- 2-4 sentences.
desired_outcome TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Success definition.
strategic_linkage TEXT,  -- Linked strategic objective.
requested_by_date DATE,  -- Need-by date.
scope_in TEXT,  -- Scope sketch — in.
scope_out TEXT,  -- Scope sketch — out.
phi_flag BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT PHI involved?,
cfr11_flag BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 21 CFR Part 11 involved?,
clinical_flag BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Clinical / study?,
vendor_flag BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Vendor involved?,
data_sharing_flag BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT External data sharing?,
effort VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Effort bucket.,  -- effort_bucket
budget_envelope VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Budget bucket.,  -- budget_envelope
funding_source VARCHAR DEFAULT Funding source.,  -- funding_source
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Submission lifecycle.,  -- intake_status
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_submission_requester_person_id FOREIGN KEY (requester_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_submission_requesting_department_id FOREIGN KEY (requesting_department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id)
-- D13  Intake Compliance Pre-screen
-- Per-frame pre-screen attestation.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.intake_compliance_prescreen (
prescreen_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
intake_id VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,  -- Parent intake.
frame_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Frame screened.
reviewer_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Pre-screen reviewer.
decision VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Result.,  -- prescreen_decision
rationale TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Rationale / conditions.
reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_compliance_prescreen_intake_id FOREIGN KEY (intake_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.intake_submission(intake_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_compliance_prescreen_frame_id FOREIGN KEY (frame_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.compliance_frame(frame_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_compliance_prescreen_reviewer_person_id FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D14  Intake Decision
-- Triage decision and routing for an intake.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.intake_decision (
decision_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
intake_id VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Parent intake.
decided_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- PMO Director or delegate.
decided_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Timestamp.
decision VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Routing.,  -- intake_decision
primary_department_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Assigned primary department.
secondary_departments TEXT,  -- JSON array of department codes.
linked_charter_doc_id VARCHAR(30),  -- Charter once issued.
linked_project_id UUID,  -- Project once kicked off.
notes TEXT,  -- Triage notes.
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_decision_decided_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (decided_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_decision_primary_department_id FOREIGN KEY (primary_department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_decision_linked_charter_doc_id FOREIGN KEY (linked_charter_doc_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(doc_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_intake_decision_linked_project_id FOREIGN KEY (linked_project_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.project(project_id)
-- D15  RACI Assignment
-- Per-document, per-department R/A/C/I role.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.raci_assignment (
raci_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Document.
department_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Department.
role VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT R/A/C/I.,  -- raci_role
touchpoint VARCHAR(300),  -- What the dept does on this doc.
valid_from DATE NOT NULL,  -- Effective from.
valid_to DATE,  -- Effective to (open ended).
CONSTRAINT fk_raci_assignment_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_raci_assignment_department_id FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id)
-- D16  Document × Compliance Mapping
-- Which frames govern which doc; with evidence link.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.doc_compliance_mapping (
mapping_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Document.
frame_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Frame.
applies_to_sections TEXT,  -- Which sections of the doc.
evidence_reference TEXT,  -- Audit evidence pointer.
CONSTRAINT fk_doc_compliance_mapping_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_doc_compliance_mapping_frame_id FOREIGN KEY (frame_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.compliance_frame(frame_id)
-- D17  Change Request (Governance)
-- CR against a controlled document. Class A/B/C per SOP-003.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.change_request_gov (
cr_gov_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
cr_code VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- CHG-NNN.
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Target controlled document.
intake_id VARCHAR(16),  -- Linked intake if applicable.
requested_at DATE NOT NULL,  -- Submission date.
requested_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Requester.
cr_class VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Class A/B/C/Emergency.,  -- cr_class
description TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Proposed change.
reason TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Driver.
decision VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Approval decision.,  -- cr_decision
decided_by_person_id UUID,  -- Approver.
decided_at DATE,  -- Decision date.
implementation_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT Verified.,
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT CR state.,  -- cr_status
CONSTRAINT fk_change_request_gov_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_change_request_gov_intake_id FOREIGN KEY (intake_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.intake_submission(intake_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_change_request_gov_requested_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (requested_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_change_request_gov_decided_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (decided_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D18  Change Impact Assessment (Gov)
-- Per-department impact statement on a governance CR.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.change_assessment_gov (
gov_impact_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
cr_gov_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Parent CR.
department_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Assessor's department.
impact_summary TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Impact statement.
compliance_impact TEXT,  -- Compliance / regulatory impact.
submitted_at DATE NOT NULL,  -- Submission date.
CONSTRAINT fk_change_assessment_gov_cr_gov_id FOREIGN KEY (cr_gov_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.change_request_gov(cr_gov_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_change_assessment_gov_department_id FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id)
-- D19  Training Curriculum
-- Set of documents required for a given role.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.training_curriculum (
curriculum_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
code VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Curriculum code.
name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,  -- Curriculum name.
role_id UUID,  -- Role this curriculum targets.
department_id UUID,  -- Owning department.
active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Active flag.,
CONSTRAINT fk_training_curriculum_role_id FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.role(role_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_training_curriculum_department_id FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.department(department_id)
-- D20  Curriculum Item
-- Document required by a curriculum.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.curriculum_item (
curriculum_item_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
curriculum_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Parent curriculum.
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Required doc.
required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Required vs recommended.,
sequence SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT Display order.,
CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_item_curriculum_id FOREIGN KEY (curriculum_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.training_curriculum(curriculum_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_item_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id)
-- D21  Training Assignment
-- Curriculum or single doc assigned to a person.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.training_assignment (
assignment_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Trainee.
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Specific doc.
curriculum_id UUID,  -- Curriculum that triggered the assignment.
assigned_at DATE NOT NULL,  -- Assignment date.
target_date DATE NOT NULL,  -- Target completion.
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Assignment state.,  -- training_status
manager_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Assigning manager.
CONSTRAINT fk_training_assignment_person_id FOREIGN KEY (person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_training_assignment_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_training_assignment_curriculum_id FOREIGN KEY (curriculum_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.training_curriculum(curriculum_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_training_assignment_manager_person_id FOREIGN KEY (manager_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D22  Comprehension Check
-- Quiz attempt result tied to an assignment.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.comprehension_check (
check_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
assignment_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Parent assignment.
attempt_number SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT Attempt number.,
score_pct NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT Score 0-100.,
passed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT Pass = score ≥ 80.,
taken_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Quiz timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_comprehension_check_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY (assignment_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.training_assignment(assignment_id)
-- D23  Training Attestation
-- Signed attestation under 21 CFR §11.50.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.training_attestation (
attestation_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
assignment_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Parent assignment.
person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Trainee.
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Doc attested to.
version VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,  -- Doc version at attestation.
attestation_meaning VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Per 21 CFR §11.50.,  -- signature_meaning
attested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Signed timestamp.
esig_hash VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,  -- Signature hash.
refresher_due DATE,  -- Next refresher date.
CONSTRAINT fk_training_attestation_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY (assignment_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.training_assignment(assignment_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_training_attestation_person_id FOREIGN KEY (person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_training_attestation_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id)
-- D24  Records Retention Policy
-- Retention rules per record class.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.records_retention_policy (
policy_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
record_class VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Record class.
system_of_record VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Authoritative system.,  -- storage_system
retention_years SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT Minimum retention years.,
retention_basis VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Retention basis.,  -- retention_basis
disposition_default VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Default disposition.,  -- disposition
legal_basis VARCHAR(200),  -- Citation.
-- D25  Records Disposition
-- Disposition event for a record reaching end of retention.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.records_disposition (
disposition_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
document_id UUID,  -- Linked document.
record_class VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Record class disposed.,  -- record_class
disposition VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Action.,  -- disposition
disposed_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Records Steward.
disposed_at DATE NOT NULL,  -- Disposition date.
method VARCHAR(200),  -- Method (shred / archive / transfer).
approved_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Approver.
notes TEXT,  -- Notes.
CONSTRAINT fk_records_disposition_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_records_disposition_disposed_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (disposed_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_records_disposition_approved_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (approved_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D26  Audit Evidence Pack
-- Curated record set assembled for an audit.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.audit_evidence_pack (
pack_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
pack_code VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- Pack code.
audit_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,  -- Audit description.
audit_scope TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Scope of evidence.
frame_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Frame being audited.
prepared_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Pack owner.
prepared_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Pack assembly time.
audit_start DATE NOT NULL,  -- Audit start.
audit_end DATE,  -- Audit end.
outcome VARCHAR DEFAULT Outcome.,  -- audit_outcome
retain_until DATE NOT NULL,  -- Retention end (audit + 7 yrs).
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_pack_frame_id FOREIGN KEY (frame_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.compliance_frame(frame_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_pack_prepared_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (prepared_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D27  Audit Evidence Item
-- Individual record included in an evidence pack.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.audit_evidence_item (
evidence_item_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
pack_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Parent pack.
document_id UUID,  -- Linked document.
attestation_id UUID,  -- Linked attestation.
disposition_id UUID,  -- Linked disposition.
description TEXT NOT NULL,  -- What this item demonstrates.
added_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Person who added.
added_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Add timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_item_pack_id FOREIGN KEY (pack_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.audit_evidence_pack(pack_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_item_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_item_attestation_id FOREIGN KEY (attestation_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.training_attestation(attestation_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_item_disposition_id FOREIGN KEY (disposition_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.records_disposition(disposition_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_evidence_item_added_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (added_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D28  Deviation
-- Documented deviation from an SOP.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.deviation (
deviation_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
sop_document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- SOP deviated from.
reported_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Reporter.
reported_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Timestamp.
severity VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Minor / Major / Critical.,  -- severity
description TEXT NOT NULL,  -- What happened.
root_cause TEXT,  -- Root cause if known.
capa_id UUID,  -- Linked CAPA if opened.
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT State.,  -- deviation_status
CONSTRAINT fk_deviation_sop_document_id FOREIGN KEY (sop_document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_deviation_reported_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (reported_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_deviation_capa_id FOREIGN KEY (capa_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.capa(capa_id)
-- D29  CAPA Record
-- Corrective and Preventive Action.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.capa (
capa_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
code VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL UNIQUE,  -- CAPA-NNN.
trigger VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Trigger.,  -- capa_trigger
opened_at DATE NOT NULL,  -- Open date.
opened_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Opener.
owner_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- CAPA owner.
root_cause_due DATE NOT NULL,  -- RCA due.
root_cause TEXT,  -- Root cause analysis.
corrective_action TEXT,  -- Corrective action.
preventive_action TEXT,  -- Preventive action.
effectiveness_review_due DATE,  -- Effectiveness check due.
status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT State.,  -- capa_status
closed_at DATE,  -- Closure date.
CONSTRAINT fk_capa_opened_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (opened_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_capa_owner_person_id FOREIGN KEY (owner_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D30  Access Grant
-- Role-based access assignment to a document.
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.access_grant (
grant_id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
document_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Document.
principal_type VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Person, Role, or Department.,  -- principal_type
principal_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- ID of person/role/department.
permission VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Permission granted.,  -- permission
granted_by_person_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Granter.
granted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,  -- Grant timestamp.
revoked_at TIMESTAMPTZ,  -- Revocation timestamp.
CONSTRAINT fk_access_grant_document_id FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.document(document_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_access_grant_granted_by_person_id FOREIGN KEY (granted_by_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
-- D31  Audit Trail Entry
-- Append-only audit log entry (21 CFR §11.10(e)).
CREATE TABLE doc_mgmt.audit_trail_entry (
trail_id BIGSERIAL NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT Event timestamp.,
actor_person_id UUID,  -- Acting person.
action VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT Action taken.,  -- audit_action
entity_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,  -- Entity touched.
entity_id UUID NOT NULL,  -- Entity ID.
before_state JSONB,  -- Pre-image.
after_state JSONB,  -- Post-image.
ip_address INET,  -- Client IP.
reason TEXT,  -- Reason supplied.
CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_entry_actor_person_id FOREIGN KEY (actor_person_id) REFERENCES doc_mgmt.person(person_id)
